items.caption: A screenshot of a google maps interface with a custom overlay of election results for the los altos school district. the map is centered on the los altos area, with various precincts labeled and color-coded to represent voting results. each precinct is marked with a thumbnail image of a voter, presumably indicating the candidate they voted for. the map also includes a legend and a title at the top that reads "clickable map" followed by a subtitle "your lasd neighbors' voting - trump, tanya, gg by precinct." the interface elements suggest that users can click on the map to view the voting results for each precinct. the map is overlaid on a standard google maps view of the los altos area, with streets and landmarks visible.
